title: Rocker-kun / Kumatander No. 2
overview: Tanaka is very oblivious when it comes to love. That said, Ueno methods can safely be described as extremely unconventional.

title: Dash-tan / 1-7-6 Protective Gear
overview: Testing Ueno's latest invention requires smelly clothes. Later, her new protective gear is foolproof! But maybe only in theory...

title: The Kilt Hide / Garakutan
overview: Kitanaga asks Ueno for something to censor prying eyes. Later, Ueno offers Tanaka some more water. He has suspicions this time...

title: Ueno No. 13 / The SummonStat
overview: Can Tanaka tell the difference between Ueno and a robot? Later, Ueno uses her scientific prowess to create life!

title: The P-Specter / The PE Reserver
overview: Ueno investigates mysterious rumors as a ploy to bond with Tanaka. Later, a revolutionary water filtration system involves super absorbent gym clothes.

title: II Umbrella / E-Q Booster
overview: Why suffer the inconvenience of using umbrellas when superior anti-gravitational fields can do the job better? Later, a belt promises to give Ueno an edge in a sumo match.

title: Panty Roti / The Gatcha-Porter
overview: Is Tanaka so hungry he'd be willing to eat anything? Afterwards, this toy capsule vending machine dispenses unconventional items.

title: Coitsu Nate Luna D / Pero-Lilion
overview: Will the truth finally come out thanks to a sleeping pill? Later, Tanaka's sisters stop by for a visit!

title: JigaTights / SQ-Water
overview: Can Ueno use tights to charge a cell phone? She seems to have found a way! She also has an idea regarding a new use for swimsuits.

title: Kanchikan / Repara-te
overview: A cute accessory is actually an alarm system in disguise. Sometime later, Ueno's next creation unexpectedly leads to inquiries regarding leg hair.

title: Invisi-Bloomer / The Rear-Skirt
overview: Chairs are now obsolete forever! That is if Ueno would only consider the practical applications of her invention. Later on, the Tennis Club needs Ueno's help.

title: GAN-Q / Ballet-tan
overview: Tanaka, you really need to stop and think about what comes out of your mouth. Later, Ueno creates a device that shares sensory experiences? ...It's gonna backfire, isn't it?
